name: mageme/module-eu-withdrawal
description: Magento 2 implementation scaffolding for the EU consumer-withdrawal workflow under Art. 11a Directive 2011/83/EU (as amended by 2023/2673): guided storefront flow (find order, select items, confirm), durable-medium receipt email, 22-locale Annex I content. NOT legal advice — see README disclaimer; merchant is responsible for compliance verification.
